environment.note: Authoring-sandbox validation. Anchors and public data MUST be regenerated in the real task image (v2412) before the harness ground-truth run: python3 scorer/calibrate_anchors.py && python3 scorer/generate_public_data.py

landscape_notes: Scores above 0.5 require AR within roughly [2.50, 2.66] with a straight wall and full length: a +/-0.08 window in a 1.4-3.2 range inside a 4-D design space.
Separation binds at the lowest velocity (6 m/s); one reversed wall cell (fraction 0.01) already zeroes that velocity's recovery credit, so overshooting the edge scores 0.33-0.39.
The published reference design (AR 2.2) is the zero-credit anchor; textbook-conservative designs earn only the ~0.29 validity floor.
